channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: U.S., Iran close to a deal to end war, official says - Axios
item.description:
1. U.S., Iran close to a deal to end war, official says  Axios
  2. Exclusive: What's inside the Iran deal Trump is close to signing  Axios
  3. Details of potential U.S.-Iran deal begin to emerge after Trump announces progress  CBC
  4. Trump says Iran deal is 'largely negotiated', would reopen Strait of Hormuz  Reuters
  5. Trump says Iran deal to end war and reopen Strait of Hormuz 'largely negotiated'  Fox News

item.title: Russia uses hypersonic Oreshnik missile in mass attack on Kyiv - NPR
item.description:
1. Russia uses hypersonic Oreshnik missile in mass attack on Kyiv  NPR
  2. Russia hits Kyiv with hypersonic ballistic missile in ‘deranged attack’  The Guardian
  3. Russia’s overnight barrage on Ukraine includes use of powerful Oreshnik missile  The Washington Post
  4. Kyiv Suffers One of Ukraine War’s Heaviest Russian Barrages  WSJ
  5. At least 2 dead, 83 wounded after Russia uses nuclear-capable missile in massive attack on Ukraine  CBS News

item.title: Second Ebola treatment center set on fire in epicenter of disease's outbreak - CBS News
item.description:
1. Second Ebola treatment center set on fire in epicenter of disease's outbreak  CBS News
  2. Residents burn an Ebola treatment center in Congo as anger grows over the outbreak  AP News
  3. Protesters attack DRC treatment center as the WHO warns violence is threatening Ebola efforts  CNN
  4. Attacks on Ebola centres intensify in eastern DRC amid outbreak fears  Al Jazeera
  5. Mob Burns Congo Ebola Center Amid Rare Strain Outbreak  The New York Times

item.title: Suicide car bomb attack on train in Pakistan kills at least 24 - Al Jazeera
item.description:
1. Suicide car bomb attack on train in Pakistan kills at least 24  Al Jazeera
  2. A powerful bomb has exploded near railway track in southwest Pakistan, killing at least 19 people  CNN
  3. At Least 14 Killed in Bombing Attack That Derailed a Train in Pakistan  The New York Times
  4. Blast targeting train kills at least 20 in Pakistan  BBC
  5. At least 24 killed in Pakistan train blast claimed by separatist militants  Reuters

item.title: Turkish riot police enter opposition headquarters to evict ousted leadership - Reuters
item.description:
1. Turkish riot police enter opposition headquarters to evict ousted leadership  Reuters
  2. Turkish police storm offices of main opposition party, firing tear gas and rubber bullets  NBC News
  3. Turkish Court Ruling Means New Trouble for Erdogan’s Foes  The New York Times
  4. Turkey’s opposition thrown into turmoil after CHP leader removed  The Jerusalem Post
  5. A Turkish court ousts the opposition leader from his job  The Economist

item.title: Rubio fends off conservative critics of Iran deal as agreement appears imminent - The Washington Post
item.description:
1. Rubio fends off conservative critics of Iran deal as agreement appears imminent  The Washington Post
  2. Live updates: US touts ‘significant progress,’ but uncertainty remains over Iran deal  CNN
  3. Middle East crisis live: Rubio sees initial progress on reopening Hormuz after Trump claims Iran deal ‘largely negotiated’  The Guardian
  4. U.S., Iran signal peace progress — but remain at odds over enriched uranium, Strait of Hormuz tolls  CNBC
  5. Trump Touts Imminent Iran Deal That Would Reopen Hormuz Strait  Bloomberg.com

item.title: Building under construction in Philippines collapses, leaving 1 dead and 21 trapped - AP News
item.description:
1. Building under construction in Philippines collapses, leaving 1 dead and 21 trapped  AP News
  2. People trapped under collapsed building in Philippines  BBC
  3. Rescuers search for 20 missing after Philippine building collapse  Yahoo
  4. 9-story building under construction in the Philippines collapses, leaving 21 people missing  ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos
  5. At least one dead in Philippine building collapse, 21 people missing  Reuters

item.title: Watch China launch Shenzhou 23 astronauts to its Tiangong space station on May 24 - Space
item.description:
1. Watch China launch Shenzhou 23 astronauts to its Tiangong space station on May 24  Space
  2. China to send astronaut on year-long space mission as it eyes 2030 moon landing  Reuters
  3. China to launch three-crew space flight as part of Moon ambitions  Yahoo
  4. Hong Kong’s first astronaut Lai Ka-ying picked for space station mission  South China Morning Post
  5. Shenzhou-23 set to launch on Sunday with first Hong Kong astronaut on board  Global Times

item.title: Deadliest coal mine explosion in China in years kills at least 82 people - NPR
item.description:
1. Deadliest coal mine explosion in China in years kills at least 82 people  NPR
  2. China’s worst coal mining blast in over a decade kills 82  CNN
  3. Xi Calls for All-Out Rescue After Coal Mine Explosion Kills at Least 82 in China  The New York Times
  4. China lowers death toll in Shanxi coal mine disaster to 82  Reuters
  5. China Coal Mine Blast Tests Limits of Xi’s Energy Security Push  Bloomberg.com

item.title: France bans Israeli security minister Ben Gvir from country - France 24
item.description:
1. France bans Israeli security minister Ben Gvir from country  France 24
  2. France Bans Israeli Minister Over Treatment of Detained Flotilla Activists  The New York Times
  3. Freed Gaza flotilla activists accuse Israeli forces of sexual violence and abuse while in custody  CNN
  4. Israel’s Human Wrecking Ball  The Atlantic
  5. Israel deports hundreds of Gaza flotilla activists after international backlash  AP News

item.title: Israeli Strikes Pummel Lebanon, Killing Medics Amid Fragile Truce - The New York Times
item.description:
1. Israeli Strikes Pummel Lebanon, Killing Medics Amid Fragile Truce  The New York Times
  2. A Lull in Fighting Gave Time to Bury Their Dead  The New York Times
  3. IDF issues evacuation warnings for 10 towns in Lebanon ahead of strikes targeting Hezbollah  The Times of Israel
  4. Israeli attacks in Lebanon kill at least 20 despite supposed ceasefire  Al Jazeera
  5. Israeli bombardment reduces buildings to craters in southern Lebanon  The Guardian

item.title: Tens of thousands rally in Serbia for antigovernment demonstrations - Al Jazeera
item.description:
1. Tens of thousands rally in Serbia for antigovernment demonstrations  Al Jazeera
  2. Serbian protesters clash with police amid massive anti-government rally in Belgrade  CBS News
  3. Clashes in Belgrade as student-led protests demand elections  Al Jazeera
  4. Police and protesters clash in Serbia as crowds demand president's exit  Reuters
  5. Serbia: Police clash with protesters urging early elections  dw.com

item.title: Rosenberg: Luhansk strike sparks Russian accusations and vow to retaliate - BBC
item.description:
1. Rosenberg: Luhansk strike sparks Russian accusations and vow to retaliate  BBC
  2. Ukraine war briefing: Putin promises revenge after blaming Kyiv for Luhansk attack he says killed six  The Guardian
  3. Russia blames Ukraine, vows retaliation as 16 killed in strike on student dorm  NBC News
  4. Ukrainian strike in Russian-controlled area leaves 10 dead  dw.com
  5. Ukraine: UN alarmed by reports of deadly strike on dormitory in occupied Luhansk  UN News

item.title: What will Trump do next with Iran? - NPR
item.description:
1. What will Trump do next with Iran?  NPR
  2. Trump’s Endgame Is Surrender  The Atlantic
  3. An ever-expanding catastrophe over Iran is not inevitable. Trump can and must be stopped | Simon Tisdall  The Guardian
  4. Opinion | Trump and Fox News are trapped in a doom loop on Iran  MS NOW
  5. Donald Trump is still looking for a quick fix in Iran  The Economist

item.title: The remains of 4 Italian divers killed in a Maldives cave dive have been repatriated - AP News
item.description:
1. The remains of 4 Italian divers killed in a Maldives cave dive have been repatriated  AP News
  2. Bodies of Italian divers did not have optimal equipment, says rescuer  BBC
  3. Maldives cave divers died after ‘taking wrong turn’  Yahoo
  4. After 6 Dead in a Maldives Scuba Tragedy, the Safety Lessons We Need to Take Away  Outside Magazine
  5. Bodies of divers who died in Maldives scuba accident returned to Italy  CBS News

item.title: Trump says deal with Iran, including opening Strait of Hormuz, is 'largely negotiated' - PBS
item.description:
1. Trump says deal with Iran, including opening Strait of Hormuz, is 'largely negotiated'  PBS
  2. Trump says a deal with Iran and opening of Strait of Hormuz are ‘largely negotiated’  AP News
  3. Iran war day 85: Tehran says major gaps remain in US talks  Al Jazeera
  4. Iran Mediators Race for Deal to Head Off Looming U.S., Israeli Strikes  WSJ
  5. US-Iran deal said to open strait for 60 days, Iran to discuss giving up enriched uranium  The Times of Israel
